zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun於1150年出生在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 登巴頓史爾度巴頓時，他的父親Humphrey Kilpatrick20歲，母親Mrs Humphrey Kilpatrick21歲。他於1180年與Annabelle Kilpatrick在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾拉斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1220年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特拉斯享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Colquhoun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Colquhoun in Dumbartonshire. The name appears to derive from Gaelic còil, cùil ‘nook, corner’, or coill(e) ‘wood’ + cumhann ‘narrow’. The usual Scottish pronunciation is ka-hoon. This is the name of a Scottish family descended from Umfridus de Kilpatrick, who acquired lands in the barony of Colquhoun during the reign of Alexander II (1214–49).

variants.name: Cohoon
meanings: English (Cheshire) and Scottish: variant of   Colquhoun  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Calhoun
meanings: History: This prominent early American name was brought across the Atlantic Ocean by Scotch-Irish pioneers who entered Pennsylvania c. 1733. The American statesman John c. Calhoun (1782–1850), born in Abbeville District, SC, served in both houses of Congress, was secretary of war, and vice president of the US (1825–32).

variants.name: Cahoon
meanings: Irish (Down and Antrim): variant (reflecting the traditional pronunciation) of Scottish   Colquhoun  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun was born in 1150, in Dumbarton, West Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Humphrey Kilpatrick, was 20 and his mother, Mrs Humphrey Kilpatrick, was 21. He married Annabelle Kilpatrick in 1180, in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1220, in Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

ko.Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 루스
ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun(이)가 1150년 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 던바토실르 드바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Kilpatrick(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Humphrey Kilpatrick(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1180년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 루스에서 Annabelle Kilpatrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1220년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 루스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun родился в 1150 г. в местности думбартон, вест дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Humphrey Kilpatrick было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Humphrey Kilpatrick, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Annabelle Kilpatrick в 1180 г. в местности лусс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1220 г. в местности лусс, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.
